notableEvents.label: Taylor Walls GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Cedric Mullins out at 2nd. Taylor Walls out at 1st.
